env_bootstrap: Add NEXT_PUBLIC_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY only if the template uses Stripe.js directly.
local_prerequisites: A local database matching the Foundation runtime contract
smoke_steps: POST /api/billing/checkout with auth and a valid offer_key returns a checkout URL.
POST /api/billing/portal with auth returns a portal URL.
POST /api/webhooks/stripe without a valid signature returns 400.
A signed webhook event updates the mirrored billing state.
windows_notes: Run commands from the Foundation-Core root.
Quote paths or use a junction alias when shelling through directories that contain an ampersand.
export_rule: Stripe integration must boot from the exported Foundation-Core root without monorepo-only path assumptions.
